calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Miles in Propria Persona.
Aurora Ingram appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Miles stated that the Court approved the sale of the property, but they ran into problems with her Mother and Father being on title as tenants in common instead of joint tenants as they thought, and that she filed a supplemental declaration on August 27th. Ms. Miles also stated that the sale is to close on September 15th, that the Buyers have been waiting since March and have been very patient, and that she made a personal appearance because she was hoping to get the order signed today and get this through. The Court noted that it allowed the sale of 100% interest of the property, but the estate does not own 100% and stated that the order confirming the sale will need to be vacated because 100% of the property can't be transferred. The Court also stated that it can grant today's petition, but the four heirs will get 1/4 of 2/3 of Phillips share and that they will also need to file a spousal property petition in Freddie's estate to transfer the other 1/3. The Court also informed Ms. Miles that she will need to file a petition to confirm sale of real property in Freddie's estate. Ms. Miles will bring the spousal property petition to the Probate Department when it is ready for filing for the purpose of obtaining an early hearing date. Ms. Miles stated that all of the four heirs want to get the property sold. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is under submission with the intent to grant the petition as to 2/3 of Phillip's estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
